description: This Java class configures Spring Security for a backend API, setting up JWT-based stateless authentication, request authorization rules, and integrating with external services like JwtService.

classes.name: SecurityConfig
classes.description: Spring Security configuration class that defines security filter chain, JWT authentication, request authorization, and security-related settings.

methods.name: securityFilterChain
methods.description: Configures the security filter chain with CSRF disabled, CORS enabled, stateless session management, request authorization rules, and a JWT authentication filter.
